Center: US National Nuclear Data Center, Brookhaven, USA
ref: Jour: Canadian Journal of Physics, Vol.61, p.1490 (1983)
title: Cumulative yields of stable and long-lived isotopes of Tin in neutron-induced fission

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Canadian Journal of Physics, Vol.61, p.1490 (1983)

x4freetext: Cumulative yields of stable and long-lived isotopes of
Thermal neutron flux and epicadmium neutron flux
U233 (from 7.5 to 10.7 mg), U235 (from 3.1 to 9.9 mg),
Correction from a 116Sn contamination in each sample
split in two, several BIB changes
